A New Chapter for Schoolhouse

Schoolhouse is now part of Hudson Valley Lighting Group! We’re working behind the scenes to prepare for what’s next, and we look forward to turning the lights back on soon. Thank you for your patience as we build this next chapter. If you have any questions in the meantime, please reach out to us at schoolhouse@hvlgroup.com. We’re here to help.

Explore FAQs here

Schoolhouse Trade

We’re dedicated to building long-term relationships with trade professionals who are seeking the best in quality and design. Sign-up for a trade account and receive a special discount off your order today.

SIGN UP

Who We Are

At Schoolhouse, we believe that pieces worth owning should stand the test of time. Guided by a distinct design perspective and a deep respect for craft, we create modern heirlooms made to last, to inspire, and to feel at home for generations.

ABOUT US
